allow: Bash(python -c "import ast, sys; ast.parse\(open\('app.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('syntax OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('app.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('syntax OK'\)")
